items.title: Bullish crypto bets lose $1.6 billion as ETH, SOL, DOGE drop 9%
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent $1.6 billion loss in bullish crypto positions highlights increased volatility, impacting SOL's market sentiment and liquidity.

items.title: Solana Now Has Native Subscriptions & Allowances
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of native subscriptions and allowances on Solana enhances ecosystem functionality, potentially driving user engagement and transaction volume.

items.title: Build Fully Onchain Perps on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The ability to build fully on-chain perpetual contracts on Solana could attract developers, boosting the platform's utility and overall ecosystem growth.
